New Smart Carbon Cleaning Tech Fights Harmful Bacteria And Leaves Your Screens Crystal Clear

Sponsored by ScreenKlean

OVER 650,000 already sold and counting!

People are RAVING about this scientists smart invention for eliminating harmful bacteria from phones, tablets, and more (including his own).

Did you know that your cell phone has 18x more bacteria than a public restroom? Throughout the day, all the bacteria you touch on grocery carts, gas pumps, doorknobs, and even other people are transferred and stored on your phone.

And worse yet, warm places like pockets and purses are breeding grounds for bacteria. Then, when we use our phones germs can be transferred back to our hands, faces and everyday items like food, possibly making us sick.

Isn't it crazy that we spend $100’s and $1,000’s on expensive electronics that have gorgeous, HD screens and then we resort to using cheap rags and sprays to clean them? Problem with those so-called ‘screen approved’ cloths is, even with some extra elbow-grease, they often only smear, smudge, and leave harmful bacteria behind.

Well, there’s a new product being used in the aerospace industry that everyone’s buzzing about. It’s an advanced carbon molecular cleaning pad that actually attracts and removes dirt, oil and fingerprints. AND best of all, it fights bacteria build up too!

So, I bought one to see how it stacks up to my trusty micro-cloth and screen-clean spray. All I can say is, after my first use, I threw my micro-cloths and spray away! There simply wasn’t any comparison.

Founded by Daniel Patton, these were created for everyone who wants to easily be able to keep their screens free from bacteria AND crystal clear. "This is the closest thing to magic you'll ever see" said Daniel Patton, Carbon Klean CEO.

Any device screen can now be cleaned on the molecular level better than anything else using ScreenKlean. Today, ScreenKlean has sold over 650,000 units across the world! 

What is it?

It’s called ScreenKlean and it makes cleaning with rags & liquids seem so ridiculous now. That’s because unlike typical screen cleaners that mostly smear and smudge, ScreenKlean has a patented Carbon Molecular Cleaning Technology that ATTRACTS, GRABS, and REMOVES dirt, oils, fingerprints, and fights harmful bacteria.

One wipe with ScreenKlean and your screens don’t just look ‘better’ than before, they look crystal clear spotless after every clean!

And, ScreenKlean works on ANY and ALL of your devices – smartphones, tablets, e-readers, computers, TV…everything!

The advanced carbon technology naturally combats bacteria on your touch screens, eg – smartphone & tablet. So everytime you clean your screen you’re also fighting germ residue! Now that’s a 2-for-1 benefit I like!

And get this…

NASA actually uses this very same carbon cleaning technology! So if it’s good enough for them, it can’t be a figment of my imagination.

How does it work?

Well the makers of ScreenKlean actually engineered what they call a ‘smart’ carbon cleaning molecule.

Here’s how ScreenKlean works when you swipe the carbon pad across your device’s screen…

And cleaning the dirty carbon pad is super easy. All you do is slide it back into the ‘Recharging’ station. The simple action of sliding the pad actually replaces the dirty ‘Smart’ carbon molecules with fresh new, clean molecules. So it’s ready for your next crystal clear cleaning.

So the dirty ‘smart’ carbon molecules actually move AWAY from the tip of the pad and are replaced by new, clean carbon molecules. That’s what happens when you ‘Recharge’ your carbon pad. Pretty amazing, right?

The problem with micro-cloths is they really just smear and smudge dirt, oils and bacteria around.

And worse… those soft micro-cloths actually leave micro-scratches on your screens. Damaging your screens and degrading the quality of your HD picture over time – yikes!

PLUS…

You don’t have a dirty cloth you have to shake the dirt and gunk off of after every cleaning. I mean seriously, have ever looked at the gunk that gets caked onto your cloth after you WIPE your computer or tablet screen? It can get pretty gross not to mention full of bacteria!

What Else I Love About ScreenKlean

  • It Works On ALL Screens – easily clean your smartphones, computers, tablets, TV screens and more!
  • It Fights Bacteria – ScreenKlean's advanced carbon technology safely & effectively combats bacteria buildup on your touchscreens!
  • It's Long Lasting – each pad super cleans your screens 100’s of times!
  • It's Earth Friendly & Safe – carbon pads are all-natural, environmentally friendly, and have no harmful chemicals or toxins commonly found in liquid cleaners.
  • It Never Smears – The soft carbon microfiber pads eliminate oil and fingerprints instead of smearing like cloths and sprays.
  • It Never Scratches – Unlike micro-cloths that can scratch, the ultra-soft carbon pads are 100% safe to use on ALL your expensive screens!
  • It's Easy to Clean – simply sliding the carbon pad back into the recharging station cleans & ‘recharges’ the pad.
  • It's Travel Friendly – its small compact size makes ScreenKlean super portable.
  • Their 30-day Money Back Guarantee– If for any reason you’re not 100% satisfied with ScreenKlean, you can easily return it within 30 days, hassle-free!

ScreenKlean is starting to make a name for itself, which is no surprise! People everywhere are raving about it! (In fact, ScreenKlean has THOUSANDS OF 5-STAR REVIEWS ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐)

People don’t just love ScreenKlean because it works, but because it is super easy to use too!

It’s so easy and inexpensive, there’s really no reason not to order your ScreenKlean right now! This is especially true since there’s ABSOLUTELY NO RISK to give the ScreenKlean a try. What I love about this company is that they stand behind their product! Don’t love it? Send it back for a full refund. (But you won’t want to!)
